$schema_note: RDR-007 §4 golden conformance fixture, generalized by RDR-009 — the AgentTask / AgentResult / AgentOutcome / Artifact shapes. CROSS-HOST: both the TS host (interfaces in types.ts) and the Python host (TypedDicts in run_arm.py) assert these exact key sets, the AgentOutcome value set, and the Artifact union (four kinds). Field names are the JSON contract keys (camelCase) — identical across hosts so a fixture is byte-identical. `timeout` is in MILLISECONDS; `cost` is USD (0 for free-local). RDR-009: AgentResult.patch (string) is replaced by AgentResult.artifacts (Artifact[]); the git-diff harvester wraps the source diff into a {kind:'patch'} artifact. patchArtifact(result) is a TS-internal accessor and does NOT preserve the old wire shape.

artifact.$note: RDR-009 Artifact union — exactly FOUR kinds (do NOT add a fifth without a real consumer). The git-diff harvester (PULL channel) produces `patch`; the /accept harvester (PUSH channel: emitted + finalMessage, RDR-009 Phase 2) produces `value`/`entity`/`tier`. Both conformance suites assert this `kinds` set; `examples` carries one canonical literal per kind.
